error_reason: column name mismatch and positional data mismatch
gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T2.Id) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId INNER JOIN comments AS T3 ON T3.PostId = T2.Id ORDER BY T1.CreationDate DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
WITH latest_user AS (
  SELECT Id 
  FROM users 
  ORDER BY CreationDate DESC 
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT COUNT(p.Id) 
FROM posts p
INNER JOIN comments c ON p.Id = c.PostId
WHERE p.OwnerUserId = (SELECT Id FROM latest_user);
question: Identify the number of posts and comments left by the user, who has the latest created user account.
